summary: B2B API Documentation page and Webhook system testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 19/19 webhook tests passed. Frontend: B2B Docs page loads at /b2b/docs without auth, EN/TR toggle works, all sections visible, Agency Management shows 'API Docs Linki Kopyala' button.

critical_code_review_comments: Webhook CRUD endpoints properly implemented with X-API-Key authentication
HTTPS-only validation for webhook URLs is correctly enforced
Valid webhook events properly validated: reservation.created, reservation.cancelled, reservation.updated
Max 5 webhooks per agency limit correctly enforced
Webhook auto-fire uses BackgroundTasks for non-blocking delivery
Webhook signature (HMAC-SHA256) properly implemented for payload verification
B2B API Docs page is standalone (no Layout wrapper, no auth required)
Language toggle properly switches all text between EN and TR
Agency Management page correctly shows 'API Docs Linki Kopyala' button with ExternalLink icon
seed_data_creation: Created test webhooks for CRUD testing, created test reservation for webhook auto-fire testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B API Webhook system fully implemented and tested. Webhook CRUD endpoints work (POST/GET/DELETE /api/b2b/webhooks). Webhook test endpoint works (POST /api/b2b/webhooks/{id}/test). Webhooks auto-fire on reservation.created and reservation.cancelled events. B2B API Docs page at /b2b/docs is public (no auth), has EN/TR toggle, and shows all API documentation sections. Agency Management page shows 'API Docs Linki Kopyala' button for each agency.
